calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: June Leathley.
Thomas Richard Olszewski, Esq., for Petitioner: Sonia Valdez, present, as Guardian at litem for: Jose Quintero, a Minor also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows: Settlement: $80,000.00; Unpaid Medical: $4,216.03; Attorney's Fees $19,238.30;
Costs $3,046.78.
A net balance of $53,498.89 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank. Mission & 22nd, San Francisco, Ca. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
